tools.name: search_catalog
tools.description: Search the catalog for the selected storefront by name, SKU, EAN, model code or technical requirement. Bundle results expose public configuration_options; never infer compatibility from missing fields.

tools.name: lookup_catalog
tools.description: Look up up to 20 products by SKU using live Magento availability, visibility, prices and tier prices.

tools.name: get_product
tools.description: Get live product description, media, categories and bundle options, together with current price and availability.

tools.name: configure_product
tools.description: Validate public bundle selections and create a temporary configuration handle. Use only public_value_id values returned by search_catalog.

tools.name: create_cart
tools.description: Create an HPControl cart. Simple products use SKU; configurable bundle products require a configuration_handle.

tools.name: update_cart
tools.description: Replace the complete item set of an existing cart. Existing lines omitted from items are removed.

tools.name: get_cart
tools.description: Read the current items, totals and status of a cart.

tools.name: cancel_cart
tools.description: Cancel an active cart when the customer no longer wants it. This operation is idempotent.

findings.title: Read-only tool requests dangerous parameters
findings.detail: Tool "search_catalog" appears informational but accepts parameters (context) that enable code/file/secret access.

evidence.snippet: query, context, filters, requested_quantity, cursor, limit
